methods.name: list_devices
methods.description: List detected devices grouped by room (uses the ioBroker type-detector to expose functional devices with named controls)

language.description: Language for device/room/function names (defaults to the adapter language)

room.description: Filter the result to a single room (by name)

methods.name: get_states
methods.description: Retrieve the current value of one or multiple states. IDs may contain wildcards (e.g. hue.0.*.brightness)

methods.name: set_state
methods.description: Set the value of a state

value.description: New value (type depends on the state)

methods.name: set_states
methods.description: Set multiple states in one call (e.g. for scenes or group actions)

value.description: New value (type depends on the state)

methods.name: history_query
methods.description: Query historical values of a state

methods.name: list_instances
methods.description: List all adapter instances with their status

methods.name: list_adapters
methods.description: List all installed adapters with metadata (version, title, description, keywords)

methods.name: search_adapter_repository
methods.description: Search the ioBroker adapter repository (all installable adapters, not just installed ones) by keyword - use it to recommend which adapter to install for a device or service

query.description: Keyword to search for, e.g. "philips hue", "zigbee", "mqtt"

type.description: Filter by adapter category/type, e.g. lighting, climate-control, hardware

onlyNotInstalled.description: If true, return only adapters that are not installed yet

methods.name: list_hosts
methods.description: List all ioBroker hosts with their status

methods.name: get_logs
methods.description: Retrieve system logs

methods.name: ping_host
methods.description: Check whether a network device is reachable (ICMP ping, plus an optional TCP connect to a port) - useful to diagnose adapter connection errors like "connect ETIMEDOUT"

host.description: IP address or hostname to ping

port.description: Optional TCP port to probe (tests the actual service, not just the host)

methods.name: write_log
methods.description: Write a message to the ioBroker log

methods.name: system_info
methods.description: Get system and js-controller information

methods.name: search_objects
methods.description: Search objects and states by keyword (matched against ID and name) with optional filters

query.description: Keyword to search for in object IDs and names

type.description: Filter by object type, e.g. state, channel, device, script

adapter.description: Filter by source adapter instance, e.g. hue.0

methods.name: get_object
methods.description: Read a single ioBroker object by its ID

methods.name: set_object
methods.description: Create or update an ioBroker object (merges common/native) - requires object change permission

methods.name: delete_object
methods.description: Delete an ioBroker object (optionally with all children) - requires object change permission

methods.name: create_state
methods.description: Create a new state object - requires object change permission

methods.name: create_scene
methods.description: Create or update a scene for the ioBroker scenes adapter - requires object change permission

name.description: Scene name, becomes part of the ID

value.description: Value applied when the scene is activated

methods.name: read_file
methods.description: Read a file from an adapter file storage

methods.name: write_file
methods.description: Write a file to an adapter file storage - requires object change permission

content.description: File content (UTF-8, or base64 when base64=true)

methods.name: list_files
methods.description: List a directory in an adapter file storage

methods.name: file_exists
methods.description: Check whether a file exists in an adapter file storage

methods.name: delete_file
methods.description: Delete a file from an adapter file storage - requires object change permission

methods.name: rename_file
methods.description: Rename or move a file within the same adapter file storage - requires object change permission

methods.name: mkdir
methods.description: Create a directory in an adapter file storage - requires object change permission

methods.name: list_rooms
methods.description: List all rooms (enum.rooms.*)

methods.name: list_functions
methods.description: List all functions (enum.functions.*)
